content: EANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGY LINIVERSITY, ODISHA, GLNUPUR (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. | 37 /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 09/01/2026 NOTICE It is for information of the students of Diploma (2025 — 2028 Batch) 1* semester that, the Registration and Form Fill up for the Semester End Examinations of the following Course will be held as per the schedule given below. Programme / Dates of Registration Course Registration/Form Fill up Fees 10.01.2026 Diploma 2025 - 2028 to Students are advised to clear their dues before the form fill up. Form Fill up Fees Rs. 2000/- Rs. 1500/- 12.01.2026 Students are advised to complete the registration and form fill up through ERP (Online). Application Received after the due date will not be considered.
